summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-5). Real order placement (REQ-1), cancellation (REQ-2), live price fetching (REQ-3), trade history (REQ-5), and the TradeHistoryPanel are all present. However, REQ-4's core AC items — a backend query endpoint returning on-chain ICP and ckUSDT balances, and disabling the Start button when balances are insufficient — are not implemented. The BotControlPanel shows estimated grid requirements based on mid-price math, but does not fetch or display actual on-chain token balances, nor does it disable the Start button based on real balance checks.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend exposes a query endpoint returning current ICP and ckUSDT balances for the bot's principal; frontend displays both balances; Start button is disabled with explanatory message if balances are insufficient.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff shows no getBalances or similar endpoint querying on-chain ICP/ckUSDT token ledgers. BotControlPanel.tsx only estimates theoretical grid requirements from config math — it does not call any balance query, display live on-chain balances, or conditionally disable the Start button based on actual balances. useQueries.ts has no balance-fetching hook.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) providing an explicit state migration function was added, which was not requested in the build spec.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requires stable storage for order history (REQ-5). A separate migration.mo module with an explicit OldActor-to-NewActor migration function was not mentioned in any requirement.
